chapter_title.ar: باب غُسْلِ مَنْ غَسَّلَ الْمَيِّتَ وَ مَنْ مَسَّهُ وَ هُوَ حَارٌّ وَ مَنْ مَسَّهُ وَ هُوَ بَارِدٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – Washing of the one who washes the deceased, and the one who touches him while he is hot, and the one who touches him while he is cold

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
text: إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَبَّلَ عُثْمَانَ بْنَ مَظْعُونٍ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Ismail Bin Abu Ziyad,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> kissed Usman Bin Maz’oun after his death’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from ’Isma‘il ibn abu Ziyad who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah kissed ‘Uthman ibn Maz’un after his death.”
